prose:
Frontier-orbital single-point calculation on pyridine (11 atoms: N + 5C + 5H), performed with DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard', density-fit RKS) in PySCF. Gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied .xyz file at /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz — single point, not re-optimized at this level. SCF converged in 10 cycles. No warnings reported (clean run). Integrity status: trustworthy: true, all checks passed.

Key results:
- HOMO (index 20): −7.2525992 eV
- LUMO (index 21): −1.1127860 eV
- HOMO–LUMO gap (headline value): 6.1398131 eV

Koopmans-derived descriptors (orbital approximations, frozen-orbital):
- Vertical IP ≈ 7.2525992 eV
- Vertical EA ≈ 1.1127860 eV
- Electronegativity χ = 4.1826926 eV
- Chemical hardness η = 3.0699066 eV
- Chemical softness S = 0.32574281 eV⁻¹
- Electrophilicity index ω = 2.8494218 eV

Provenance: computed (not experimental). No literature comparison offered.
